title: ANC - 6.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values
scenario: ANC and Transparency modes remain OFF during a call with Transparency toggle showing unavailable popup, then return to normal toggling after call ends
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Ensure ANC Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
4. Ensure Transparency Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
5. Make or receive a call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device.
6. During the call, observe the ANC Mode setting.
7. During the call, observe the Transparency Mode toggle.
8. Tap the Transparency Mode toggle during the call.
10. After the call ends, observe the ANC Mode setting.
11. After the call ends, observe the Transparency Mode setting.
12. Attempt to toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: 1. ANC remains OFF during the call. 2. Transparency Mode is greyed out/inaccessible during the call. 3. Tapping the Transparency toggle shows a popup stating the option is not available during a call. 4. After the call ends, both ANC and Transparency remain OFF. 5. The user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally after the call.
